name: oh-story-claudecode
description: Chinese web-novel writing toolkit for Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw.

interface.longDescription: A full pipeline for Chinese web novels: market scanning, story deconstruction, long-form and short-form writing, AI-tone cleanup, review, import, cover generation, and browser-assisted research.
defaultPrompt: /story 帮我判断下一步该用哪个网文工具
/story-review 审查这章的爽点和一致性
